name: G2 API
what_it_does: G2's API provides access to software review data, product ratings, buyer intent signals, and competitive intelligence for B2B software vendors listed on the G2 marketplace.
use_cases: Embedding verified G2 review widgets and star ratings on SaaS product pages to increase conversion
Pulling buyer intent data to identify accounts actively researching your product or competitors
Monitoring new reviews in real-time and routing to CS or product teams for response or feedback loops
Competitive analysis — pulling review sentiment and feature scores for competing products
Feeding G2 review content into sales enablement tools or AI agents for objection handling
not_for: Consumer product reviews — G2 is strictly B2B software; use Yotpo or Bazaarvoice for physical products
Local business reputation management — Google Business Profile or Yelp are correct for local
High-volume programmatic review collection at scale — G2 reviews are user-submitted, not API-collected
best_when: You're a B2B SaaS company that wants to leverage your G2 presence programmatically — embedding reviews, tracking buyer intent, or monitoring competitive positioning.
avoid_when: You sell physical goods, services, or anything non-software — G2's platform and trust signals don't apply outside B2B software.

auth.notes: API key authentication via Bearer token header. Keys are provisioned through the G2 My Products dashboard. Access to intent data and advanced endpoints requires G2 Buyer Intent subscription on top of base API access.

paid_tiers.name: API Access
paid_tiers.price: included with paid G2 listing plans (~$300+/month)

pricing.notes: API access is bundled with G2 paid listing tiers. Buyer intent signals are a premium add-on with significant additional cost. Review and rating data on free listings is very limited via API.

performance.rate_limits: 100 requests/minute typical; burst allowances vary by plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Developer docs at developers.g2.com cover core endpoints but are incomplete for intent data. REST error responses return JSON with error codes but messages lack actionability for debugging.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only review and rating endpoints are fully idempotent. Review submission is handled through the G2 platform UI, not the API.
known_agent_gotchas: API access level is tied to your G2 listing tier — check what endpoints are available on your plan
Buyer intent data requires a separate expensive subscription — confirm before building agents that rely on it
Review data for competitor products is limited — you primarily get rich data for your own products
Annual contract required for most useful features — no month-to-month for intent data
Webhook events are limited to new reviews on your product — no cross-product event streaming

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR and CCPA compliant. TLS enforced. Bearer token auth is straightforward but single-key with no scope granularity. No OAuth or fine-grained permissions.
